title: Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe Song Lyrics Santhosh Subramaniam
stanzas: <div>Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe Song Lyrics Santhosh Subramaniam

Uyire uyire piriyadhe
uyirai thookki eriyadhe
unnai pirindhaal
ulagam kidaiyaathe
o oh..

kanave kanave kalaiyadhe
kanneer thuliyil karaiyadhe
nee illaamal irave vidiyathe
o  oh..

penne nee varum munne
oru bommai pole irundhen
punnagaiyaale mugavari
thanthaaye oh ooh..

aayul muzhudhum anbe
un aruginil
vazhndhida ninaithaen
arainodi minnal pole sendraye

Uyire uyire piriyadhe
uyirai thookki eriyadhe
unnai pirindhaal
ulagam kidaiyaathe
o oh..

pul mael vazhum
panithaan kaainthaalum
thalaimael thaangiya
neram konjam
aanaal porkkaalam

un arugaamai athai
naan ilanthaalum
serndhe vazhndha
ovvoru nodiyum
ninaive santhosam

kadal moozhgiya theevugalai
kan parvaigal arivadhillai
adhupole unnul moolgivitten

Uyire uyire piriyadhe
uyirai thookki eriyadhe
unnai pirindhaal
ulagam kidaiyaathe
o oh..

Un kaikorthu adi naan
sendra idam
thananthaniyaai engae
vandhaai endre ketkiradhe

un thol saaindhu adi
naan nindra maram
nizhalai ellaam surutikondu
neruppaai erikkiradhe

..vidum en thanimai
ulagam vidum un pirivai
uyir mattum nambida
marukirathe..

Uyire uyire piriyadhe
uyirai thookki eriyadhe
unnai pirindhaal
ulagam kidaiyaathe
o oh..

kanave kanave kalaiyadhe
kanneer thuliyil karaiyadhe
nee illaamal irave vidiyathe
o  oh..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, highlighting the pain of separation.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Santhosh Subramaniam, the song reflects the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, emphasizing their emotional connection.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Sagar and composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was 'Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe' released?

The song was released on April 11, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love and longing. The soothing melody, paired with Sagar's captivating voice, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The lyrics by Na Muthukumar beautifully articulate the pain of separation, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. This song resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet feelings of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Uyire Uyire Piriyadhe from the movie Santhosh Subramaniam is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that captures the essence of love and longing. With Sagar's soulful vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's enchanting composition, this song is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Experience the magic of Na Muthukumar's poignant lyrics that beautifully convey the emotions of love and separation.
stanzaMeanings: Oh life, life, don't separate us. If you leave, the world won't exist..
Oh dream, dream, don't fade away. Don't drown in tears, without you, the night won't break..
Oh girl, before you came, I was like a doll, with your smile, you gave me direction..
I thought of living my whole life near you, like a lightning that came suddenly..
Oh life, life, don't separate us. If you leave, the world won't exist..
Even if the cool breeze blows over the flowers, the time spent under the shade is just a moment, but it feels like forever..
Even if I wander away from you, every moment spent together brings happiness to my mind..
The waves of the sea are not known to the shores, similarly, I have lost myself in you..
Oh life, life, don't separate us. If you leave, the world won't exist..
You ask where I have come from, with the mark of your touch on my hand..
Your shoulder is like a tree's shadow, I am burning with the heat of the sun..
My loneliness is released, but your separation makes my life unbearable..
Oh life, life, don't separate us. If you leave, the world won't exist..
Oh dream, dream, don't fade away. Don't drown in tears, without you, the night won't break..
